introSection: Firewhip is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Beto Carrero World in Penha, Santa Catarina, Brazil. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma. The ride originally opened at Suzuka Circuit in 1995 as Blackout (Japanese: ブラックアウト).

sections.title: History
sections.content: During the 2019 season, the trains were replaced with Vekoma's new style suspended seating arrangement.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track. The supports are red with a yellow flame pattern. The ride used to feature red track and black supports at Suzuka Circuit.

fullText:
Firewhip is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Beto Carrero World in Penha, Santa Catarina, Brazil. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma. The ride originally opened at Suzuka Circuit in 1995 as Blackout (Japanese: ブラックアウト).

During the 2019 season, the trains were replaced with Vekoma's new style suspended seating arrangement.



Yellow track. The supports are red with a yellow flame pattern. The ride used to feature red track and black supports at Suzuka Circuit.




 * Firewhip on the parks website
 * Blackout on the parks website (Japanese)
